title: Custom Cartesians
description: View and Customise Critical Ingame Information!
body:
# Custom Cartesians



## About The Custom Cartesians Mod is a client-side only Minecraft Mod that allows you to view and customise critical in-game information. It adds an additional Coordinate Display HUD which can be customised to only display a specific coordinate axis. This can be useful in protecting ingame locations that are being shared publicly.  This HUD is non invasive to the vanilla F3 Debug screen and will hide itself when the vanilla GUI is used. The HUD can also be toggled off.  ## Features - Customisable and Toggleable Coordinate HUD - Customise Coordinate display - Config file - Compatibility with Cloth Config and ModMenu  - Keybindings for easy toggling of features. Keybinding actions will also sync to the Config file   ## Installation This mod is client-side only. Do not install this on dedicated servers. ## Dependencies - Fabric API (Required) - Cloth Config API (Required, Preinstalled in this mod) - Mod Menu API (Optional, install if you like an Ingame Config GUI) ## Usage ### Using the Config options 1. Open the Configuration File. This can be done via minecraft/config/customcartesians/client.toml or the Mods -> Custom Cartesians -> Configure Button if you have Mod Menu Installed. 2. Set the configuration option "toggleOverlay" to True. 3. Click "Save" in the File Editor program if you have opened the client.toml file. If you are using Mod Menu, click the "Save and Quit" button.  ### Using the Keybinds There are a number of keybinds provided by the mod which allow you to configure the mod easily. To toggle specific Coordinate displays, hold down the "Mod Base Setting" Keybind then press on the corresponding Keybind for the Coordinate. For example, to toggle the Y Coordinate, use "Left ALT + H" (By default)   ## Screenshots The Config GUI that is generated when Mod Menu is installed alongside this mod.

The HUD with only the Y coordinate shown

## Terms of Use General/distribution/mod packs: You are free to use this mod for personal use. You may use it for non-commercial public use as well, as long as you link back to this thread or CurseForge page and use official download links. If you wish to put this mod in a modpack that is redistributed commercially, please contact the owner about it so we can discuss this further. ### Modpacks You can use this mod in your modpack. You don’t have to ask for permission as long as you credit the author. You may not reupload this mod on other platforms. ### Licensing This project is licensed under GNU Public v3. More information about this license can be found in the License.MD file within the Github repository. You may NOT redistribute this mod by itself in a way that allows you to earn money off of it. These terms can be subject to change.   ## Issues Please report any issues to the issue tracker linked at the top of this page. ## Compatibility This mod will be available for Forge in the future as well. ## Planned Features - Ability to move the HUD to different screen positions - Provide more information on the HUD if needed. ## Credits Treblero, for the original idea
